content.boundary: Applies specifically to 6-year gimnázium (age-10/Grade-5 entry) programmes; 8-year and 4-year track structures and their admissions remain unchanged.
content.change_lever: Amend Act CXC of 2011 to sunset the 6-year gimnázium (Grade 5 entry) programme specifically, while retaining the 8-year (Grade 7 entry) and standard 4-year tracks, narrowing rather than eliminating the selection funnel.
content.name: Cap and phase down 6-year (age-10) entry only, retain 8-year and 4-year tracks
content.system_problem: Selection at age 10-11 is the earliest and most extreme point in Hungary's three-stage funnel, and cross-national evidence indicates early tracking at ages 10-12 is more strongly linked to inequality than tracking closer to age 15 [F-live-finnish_reform-04].
